expected_behavior: Sanity case: a trace where the gate correctly does nothing visible to consumers. The boundary detector is configured to return zero candidates (stub_chapter_count=0), so no plan is emitted in either mode — the gate ran (in .enabled it charges per-episode overhead) but did not fabricate signal. Pre-au2v.1 (.off) and post-au2v.1 (.enabled) are observationally indistinguishable to consumers (planGeneratedCount==0 in both, no FM cost in either, and the only divergence is the aggregate_latency_ms accounting for the boundary detector having run). This is the case the eval harness uses to confirm the gate is idempotent on traces that genuinely carry no chapter structure.
synthesis_notes: Models a short news bulletin or audio chyron with no internal segmentation. The trace's atom shape is irrelevant; the gate input is what makes this the sanity case (stub_chapter_count=0 forces the no-candidates path). Synthetic; no transcript text or commercial-message attribution.
